name: Adapter request

## Target tool or workflow


## Desired behavior

What should the adapter make easier?

## Expected input

Example: `.doctrine` file, concept node, mounted receipt, instruction context.

## Expected output

Example: prompt context, local model wrapper, API payload, file export.

## Notes

Please avoid including secrets, API keys, private prompts, or personal data.
